name: wc2026-stats
title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Stats & Live Scores
description: Fetch FIFA World Cup 2026 live scores, match stats, events, standings, and goals as clean JSON. Powered by football-data.org.

FOOTBALL_DATA_API_KEY.description: API key for football-data.org. Get a free key at football-data.org. Can also be passed via the footballDataApiKey input field.
